description: Time-bounded audit advisory allowlist. Expired entries are treated as active (blocking) again.

allowlist.reason: minimatch ReDoS (HIGH) -- dev-only via jest@30 -> test-exclude -> glob -> minimatch@3.1.2. Not in production dependency tree. No user-supplied glob patterns in test runner.
allowlist.remediation: Upgrade jest to version that pulls minimatch >= 10.2.1, or wait for upstream fix in test-exclude/glob chain
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no HIGH; pnpm why minimatch confirms dev-only path

allowlist.reason: esbuild dev server CSRF (MODERATE) -- dev-only via wrangler@3.114.17 -> esbuild@0.17.19. Surfaces/workers build tool only, not in published packages. Dev server is not exposed in production.
allowlist.remediation: Upgrade wrangler to version that pulls esbuild >= 0.25.0
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no MODERATE; pnpm why esbuild confirms wrangler-only path

allowlist.reason: undici decompression bomb (MODERATE) -- dev-only via wrangler@3.114.17 -> miniflare -> undici@5.29.0. Local dev tool only, not in published packages.
allowlist.remediation: Upgrade wrangler to version that pulls undici >= 6.23.0
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no MODERATE; pnpm why undici confirms wrangler-only path

allowlist.reason: ajv $data ReDoS (MODERATE) -- root devDependency ajv@8.17.1. Used for JSON Schema validation in build/test tooling. Not in published package runtime dependencies.
allowlist.remediation: Upgrade ajv to >= 8.18.0 when available and compatible with ajv-formats
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no MODERATE; ajv is root devDependency only

allowlist.reason: qs arrayLimit bypass (LOW) -- examples/ucp-webhook-express -> express@4.22.1 -> qs@6.14.1. Example code only, not published. Express handles query parsing internally.
allowlist.remediation: Upgrade express to version that pulls qs >= 6.14.2
allowlist.verified_by: pnpm audit --prod shows no LOW; qs is in examples/ only
